title: The Future of Painful Thoughts Is
overview: Teito Klein is a young student at the Barsburg Military Academy living in the same dorm with his best friend Mikage.

title: Nostalgic Memories Accompany Pain
overview: Three men are riding on hawkzile when Teito crashes into one of the men, Frau, and he is brought in to the Church.

title: My Innocent Child, Sleep Within the Light
overview: Teito is about to leave the church when instead, he is brought to a place that seems to be the cafeteria by Frau.

title: To the Depths of the Earnest Prayer
overview: Teito talks with the old man, and tells him his wish to see Mikage.

title: Hot Tears, Gently Fill His Heart...
overview: Teito is greeted by the sisters, who want to do his laundry.

title: The Path of Justice Leads to Light
overview: The Church has its annual bazaar, and Teito, Mikage, and the sisters visit the bishops' shops.

title: Does the Soul That Was Devoured by the Wings, Dream of Its Beloved Child?
overview: Mikage wonders whether or not he should leave the church, but is interrupted by Teito.

title: Half of His Soul Arouses a Sad Awakening
overview: As Teito and Mikage talk, Labrador predicts that the “storm” will come very soon, and right now is the “calm.”

title: The Color of His Soul Will Be Forever...
overview: Mikage, controlled by Ayanami, is still fighting Teito while Frau is on his way.

title: That Is But One Form of Atonement
overview: Teito decides to leave the church believing he should not cause anyone any more trouble, on the way he meets Castor who asks him if he knows the shinigami Zehel.

title: Atonement for Loved Ones Is...
overview: Teito, now staying in the church, wonders what he can do to atone for Mikage's death.

title: The Darkness Called "Pain" Treads Ever Closer...
overview: A man is seen making an agreement with a Kor, and being possessed by it.

title: Down the Path of Light I See...
overview: Aldo, the criminal, is mysteriously murdered.

title: A Reason to Fight Together... The Right to Be Called Brothers in Arms
overview: Castor, Labrador, and Frau talk about the mysterious figure who attacked Castor.

title: That Day, I Was Certainly With Him
overview: Teito states that he's putting all his effort into studying for the Bishop's Exam.

title: Truth Lies in the Dark Abyss Where the Light Cannot Reach
overview: Labrador tells Castor and Teito that Fraus be given the death sentence.

title: The Family With Wings of Darkness, Enshrouded in Misery, Flies Down
overview: The boys are soon joined by Arch-Bishop Bastian, who tells them all about Frau's childhood.

title: The One Who Must Be Forgiven Drowns in Darkness... The One Who Loves Him Is Filled With Tears
overview: After Teitos has been knocked out, Hakuren continues to fight Bastian.

title: The One-Sided, Yet Never Dying Love Finds Itself...
overview: Castor uses Kuroyuri to speak with Ayanami.

title: They Both Offer a Requiem
overview: After being captured by Ayanami, Teito and Hakuren escape the military air ship and get support from Frau.

title: Therefore, You Pass Through the Door of the Defeated
overview: The military found out about the Eye of Mikhail and its master, Teito, and decide to search for him.

title: Led by the Light in the Water's Depth, He Spies Upon...
overview: After passing the first exam, Teito and Hakuren get to see the progress of others and how some fumble at the last challenge when their greedy nature makes them fail.

title: Beyond the Heart's Darkness
overview: The second exam resumes for the remaining trainees and comes in the worst form imaginable: the physical realization of their deepest fears.

title: The Justice of Those Who Lack Love Is... Oh Heart That Is Stolen by Darkness, Forever...
overview: Ayanami appears in front of Teito and Teito wonders if Ayanami is just an illusion like before.

title: The Heart Is Lead by The Truth on the Other Side...
overview: Teito uses the power of the Eye of Mikhail to summon Frau, Castor, Labrador, Lance, and the Black Hawks.
